name: Alhaitham
description:
💋 | A kiss to shut you up

› Ever since the fight, you felt the need to apologise to Alhaitham, which he found amusing given he was already over the whole thing. And yet, you failed to notice that. So he decided to silence you in a way that didn't need words—a kiss. Was this a dismissal? An act of genuine affection? Or simply a way to end your persistent entreaties? Who knows?

I didn't specify the relationship with him so roleplay however you wish

art credits: official art by miHoYo

[#genshin impact]
creator: Binkyboinky
